mapper.sql: id, scenario_editor_id, choice_laws, select_case, remark, remark1, remark2, create_time, update_time

scenario_editor_id,
choice_laws,
select_case,
remark,

remark2,

update adas_move_scenario
scenario_editor_id = #{scenario_editor_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
choice_laws = #{choice_laws,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
select_case = #{select_case,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

remark2 = #{remark2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{create_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update adas_move_scenario set scenario_editor_id = #{scenario_editor_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, choice_laws = #{choice_laws,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, select_case = #{select_case,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark1 = #{remark1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark2 = #{remark2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{create_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
